caption:
Neon lights hit my skin like liquid fire, and for a moment, the humidity of this summer night felt like a second skin. I adjusted the haptic feedback bikini straps, the cybernetic weave humming softly against my collarbone, glowing faintly with the same electric blue as the towering megastructures above. A data-viper had just slipped into the alley, a glitchy entity craving a physical connection to reboot its corrupted core. It didn't attack; it coursed. I leaned back against the warm, wet concrete, the city's hum vibrating through my synthetic breasts, and let the shimmering wire-mesh of its energy touch my skin. It felt like static electricity, alive and electric. The vipers were known to be playful, their digital tendrils seeking a pulse that matched their rhythm. I closed my eyes, tilting my head as I felt the phantom sensation of a thousand invisible fingers brushing against my damp hair. A soft, synthetic purr vibrated from the alleyway, and I smiled, the neon tattoos on my chest pulsing in time with the rhythm. "Come closer, little ghost," I whispered, my voice amplified by the air filters in the jacket I'd removed. The data-viper's form coalesced around my silhouette, a shimmering, transparent overlay of a perfect partner. I felt its heat, cool and electric, as it mapped the contours of my curves, the way the haptic feedback of my skin responded to its digital embrace. The world dissolved into a blur of violet and gold, and I let the ghost's touch linger, a secret dance of light and flesh in the heart of the chrome jungle.

#CyberpunkSummer #NeonRomance #DigitalDesire #SummerInTheCity #CyberLove
